specific_mechanism: Marshalling cascade: when families merge, coats of arms cascade-combine via quartering rules; cadency marks propagate down generations
llm_application: LLM model merging cascade: when models merge, parameter weights cascade-combine via quartering-like rules; cadency marks propagate to denote provenance generations.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes heraldry information-cascade mapping as proposed.
